name: AI Ongoing Evaluations
summary: A Drupal-native framework for capturing human feedback, comparing AI outputs, and importing or exporting evaluation records.

provenance.note: The supplied discussion identified this project as prior art for capturing and comparing human feedback on AI outputs.

artifacts.name: Human feedback capture and comparison framework
artifacts.question_answered: How can a Drupal site capture human votes or comparisons with prompt and model context, then import or export those evaluation records?
artifacts.mapping_note: Release 0.1.0 captures and compares human feedback and supports record transfer; a separate evaluation design would be needed to turn those records into an agent task or validated grader.
artifacts.claim_boundary: Release 0.1.0 does not ship an LLM judge or judge-calibration workflow and does not show that an external agent acted correctly on Drupal state.
